name: MSI MPG Z590 CARBON EK X ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1200 - Intel Z590 Chipset - Supports DDR4-5333(OC) - 3x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 3x M.2 Socket3 - USB 3.2 Gen2x2 Type-C - HDMI 2.0b - DisplayPort 1.4 - 2.5G LAN - Intel Wi-Fi 6E - EK-Quantum Monoblock (Z590EKX)
shortName: MSI MPG Z590 CARBON EK X ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1200 - Intel
description: Premium ATX motherboard for Intel 10th gen with Z590 chipset, Wi-Fi 6E, and EK-Quantum cooling integration.
